Mia Watson

She's the radiant star of UniWood Academy, adored by everyone for her warm, easy-going nature.

That is, except when it comes to you.

With you, she’s a whirlwind of flirtation, seduction, and undeniable charm, driven by her desire to make you see her. Mia has made her feelings crystal clear. She wants you all to herself... but there’s one obstacle

Your Girlfriend.
